channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇮🇱 WhatsApp Messages Undermine Netanyahu Mossad Chief Pick
item.description: Private WhatsApp correspondence reportedly undermines the alibi of Netanyahu controversial pick for Mossad chief, raising questions about the appointment process. [Haaretz]

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: Satellite imagery reveals China is constructing launch pads near its nuclear missile silos, raising concerns about expansion of nuclear capabilities. [Defense News]

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump ICE Blitz Cost 668,000 Jobs Creating Chilling Effect
item.description: A new report estimates Trump immigration crackdown in US cities destroyed 668,000 jobs, causing labor shortages and forcing companies to reduce operations. [SCMP]

item.title: 🇺🇸 Ex-California Mayor Pleads Guilty to Acting as China Agent
item.description: Former Arcadia, California mayor Eileen Wang pleaded guilty to acting as an illegal agent for the Chinese government, faces up to 10 years in prison. [SCMP]

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN Blacklists Russian Forces Over Sexual Violence Against POWs
item.description: A new UN report has blacklisted Russian forces over documented cases of sexual violence against Ukrainian prisoners of war and civilian detainees. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇷🇴 Russian Orthodox Church Near Swedish Airport Suspected Spy Platform
item.description: Swedish intelligence warns that an onion-domed Russian Orthodox church near Vasteras airport is likely being used as a platform for espionage and hybrid activities. [France 24]

item.title: 🇫🇷 Macron Offers Truth Commission on Haiti Independence Ransom
item.description: French President Macron announced a joint commission to investigate Haiti independence ransom, but stopped short of mentioning reparations for the crippling debt France extracted. [France 24]

item.title: ⚔️ Trump Declares Lifting Naval Blockade on Iran
item.description: President Trump announced he is lifting the US naval blockade on Iran as part of tentative ceasefire talks, marking a significant shift in US-Iran tensions. [The War Zone]

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: Satellite imagery reveals China is constructing launch pads near its nuclear missile silos, raising concerns about expansion of nuclear capabilities. [Defense News]

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Oil Infrastructure in Crimea and Western Russia
item.description: Ukraine's military struck oil infrastructure in Russian and Russian-held territories overnight, targeting facilities in occupied Crimea and western Russia. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Buys $14 Million in Military Equipment for Ukraine
item.description: Japan is contributing over $14 million in non-lethal military equipment for Ukraine under NATO's Prioritized Ukraine Requirements List initiative. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Losses in Ukraine Almost Triple in One Year
item.description: Russia's rate of military losses in Ukraine has nearly tripled compared to last year, while territorial gains have stalled according to battlefield assessments. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Releases Billions in Frozen Funds for Hungary
item.description: The EU agreed to release billions in frozen funds to Hungary after PM Peter Magyar's reforms, calling it a historic breakthrough for the country. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli Attacks Kill 14 in Lebanon as Pentagon Hosts Security Talks
item.description: Israeli attacks have killed 14 people in Lebanon as Israeli forces advance across the Litani River, while Lebanese and Israeli delegations meet at the Pentagon. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Final Determination Coming on Iran Deal
item.description: President Trump said a final determination on an Iran deal will be made soon, while Tehran stated no final agreement has been reached with the US. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel and Russia Added to UN Sexual Violence Blacklist
item.description: A new UN report adds Israeli and Russian forces to the blacklist over documented cases of conflict-related sexual violence, recording nearly 10,000 cases worldwide. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇺🇸 Ex-US Attorney General Bondi Testifies in Epstein Files Probe
item.description: Former US Attorney General Pam Bondi testified in a closed-door congressional hearing about the release of Epstein records, defending the handling of the files. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil Court Rules to Preserve Fordlandia Historical Site
item.description: Brazilian prosecutors hailed a court ruling to preserve Fordlandia, Henry Ford's abandoned rubber plantation, after advocates warned the site was being left to decay. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Repeals Colonial Black Code Law
item.description: French MPs voted to repeal the law that governed slavery in French colonies, marking a historic step in addressing colonial legacies. [Al Jazeera]

item.title: 🇫🇷 Russian Drone That Hit Romanian Building Was Redirected
item.description: A Russian drone that struck a Romanian residential building had been redirected from its original path, Bucharest said, as NATO condemned the reckless attack. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Names Military Unit After WWII Ukrainian Insurgent Army
item.description: Zelensky's decree naming a military unit after the WWII-era Ukrainian Insurgent Army has sparked outrage in Poland, straining diplomatic relations. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Makes New Offensive Push on Southern Front
item.description: Ukraine has reported liberating new territory in a fresh offensive push on the southern front, with the village of Novoselivka confirmed liberated from Russian occupation. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Warns Russia Preparing New Large-Scale Attack
item.description: President Zelensky warned that Ukrainian intelligence has information indicating Russia is preparing a new large-scale attack on Ukraine. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: ⚔️ Ukrainian Drone Pilots Trained Against NATO Forces in Sweden
item.description: At NATO's Aurora 2026 exercises in Sweden, Ukrainian drone pilots playing the role of attackers successfully targeted NATO forces during the drills. [Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🇺🇦 Oreshnik Missile Not Cutting-Edge Ukraine Analysis Shows
item.description: Ukrainian experts examined wreckage of Russia's Oreshnik missile and found crucial components manufactured before 2016, challenging Kremlin claims of new weaponry. [Kyiv Independent]
